header.title: Documentation
header.subtitle: Guides, tutorials and references to use the platform

welcome.title: 🚀 Welcome to EvoCloud!
welcome.description: This documentation will guide you through all the resources and features of our AI platform.

whatIs.title: What is EvoCloud?
whatIs.description: EvoCloud is an advanced AI platform that allows you to create, manage and interact with custom AI agents. Our platform offers an intuitive interface to configure intelligent agents that can help with various tasks.

customAgents.title: Custom Agents:
customAgents.description: Create specialized AI agents for your needs

smartChat.title: Smart Chat:
smartChat.description: Natural chat interface with your agents

advancedSettings.title: Advanced Settings:
advancedSettings.description: Control total over the behavior of agents

gettingStarted.title: Getting Started
gettingStarted.description: To get started with EvoCloud, follow these simple steps:

steps.step1: Configure your profile in the Settings area
steps.step2: Create your first agent in the Agents section
steps.step4: Start chatting with your agent in the Chat

tip.title: 💡 Tip
tip.description: We recommend starting with a simple agent and gradually adding complexity as you become familiar with the platform.

support.title: Support
support.description: If you have any questions or need help, contact our support team:
support.documentation: Documentation: This section contains detailed guides
